title: zerna aspera
intro: Zerna aspera, also known as bitter lettuce or wild lettuce, is a perennial plant belonging to the Lamiaceae family. It has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its sedative and antispasmodic effects, which can help alleviate symptoms of insomnia, anxiety, and muscle cramps. The health benefits of Zerna aspera include reducing inflammation, lowering blood pressure, and acting as a natural diuretic. Herbal preparations of Zerna aspera include infusions, tinctures, and teas, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
